allow: Bash(git -c user.name="dev" -c user.email="dev@local" commit -q -m "Boshlang'ich holat: Gemini bilan qurilgan loyiha \(backup\)")
Bash(cd /c/SEMENT/backend && rm -f db.js && echo "eski db.js o'chirildi")

Bash(powershell -Command 'Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 5000 -State Listen -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object -Expand OwningProcess -Unique | ForEach-Object { Stop-Process -Id $_ -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue }')

Bash(node -e "let d='';process.stdin.on\('data',c=>d+=c\).on\('end',\(\)=>{const j=JSON.parse\(d\); console.log\('Jami ozgarishlar:',j.total,'| Shubhali:',j.suspiciousCount\); const e=\(j.entries||[]\).find\(x=>x.text&&x.text.includes\('orqaga sana'\)\); console.log\(e?JSON.stringify\({user:e.userName,action:e.action,label:e.label,yozuv_sanasi:e.recordDate,server_vaqti:new Date\(e.ts\).toLocaleString\('ru-RU'\),summa:e.amount,bayroqlar:e.flags},null,2\):'topilmadi'\);}\)")
PowerShell(Start-Process -FilePath "cmd.exe" -ArgumentList "/k cd /d c:\\SEMENT\\backend && npm start" -WindowStyle Normal)
PowerShell(Start-Process -FilePath "cmd.exe" -ArgumentList "/k cd /d c:\\SEMENT\\dashboard && npm run dev" -WindowStyle Normal)

Bash(node -e "require\('./src/controllers/notify.controller'\); require\('./src/services/sms.service'\); require\('./src/services/telegram.service'\); require\('./src/db'\); require\('./src/routes'\); console.log\('Backend OK'\)")

PowerShell(cd "c:\\SEMENT\\backend"; $env:NODE_ENV='development'; $out = node -e "try{require\('./src/app'\)\(\); const t=require\('./src/services/telegram.service'\); console.log\('APP_OK'\); process.exit\(0\)}catch\(e\){console.error\('BOOT_ERROR:'+e.message\); process.exit\(1\)}" 2>&1; Write-Host $out)
PowerShell(try { $r = Invoke-RestMethod -Uri "http://localhost:5000/api/health" -TimeoutSec 5; $r | ConvertTo-Json -Compress } catch { Write-Host "Health xato: $\($_.Exception.Message\)" })
